label: volve_15_9_F_15A_holdout_calibration
scope_notes: Calibration is the right yardstick: a 100%-coverage possibilistic forecast should land its interval over the truth on every held-out pick. The actual inside-rate is the honest report.
Inside-rate well below 100% indicates the ensemble UNDER-STATES uncertainty (or the forward operator is biased), and the forced/measure-dependent split should be read with the matching caveat.
Train/test split is random with seed 20260607; the test set inherits the same straight-ray modeling-error from the training inversion.
